title: 9th Elementary Anti-Alien Squad
overview: Yuri has to fight aliens invading her school, and must wear some kind of yucky alien helmet...

title: Boredom, Spaceship and Overgrowth
overview: When Yuri arrives at school, she finds a weird huge mushroom-like thing in the playground.

title: Summer Vacation, Borg and Death
overview: Summer vacations have come at last, but Yuri is depressed. She still hates fighting aliens…

title: The End of the Beginning
overview: One day, a gigantic alien appears on the school rooftop and won't move from there anymore…
